NAVAREA XIX 104/23
 OCEANIC VEGA/LCHQ3 IS TOWING SEISMIC CABLES IN AREAS BOUNDED BY THE FOLOWING COORDINATES:

 ETA  AUG 10 – DEPLOYMENT AREA
 A. 65-20.9N 007-08.7E
 B. 64-49.9N 006-27.1E
 C. 64-39.2N 001-21.7E
 D. 66-18.7N 000-50.9E
 E. 66-29.4N 005-44.9E
 F. 65-20.9N 007-08.7E

 AUG 14 – WORKING AREA
 G. 65-20.9N 007-08.7E
 H. 64-49.9N 006-27.1E
 I. 65-01.5N 005-36.4E
 J. 65-32.7N 006-17.2E
 K. 65-20.9N 007-08.7E

 WIDE BERTH 3 MILES AHEAD, 3 MILES ABEAM AND 8 MILES ASTERN
 GUARD VESSELS MAINPORT CEDAR AND ANDREA STANDING BY ON VHF CH16 AND CH 74 
 PERIOD FROM AUG 10 TO SEP 2023
